name_cn:
BOÎTE CHAPEAU SOUPLE Handbag #️⃣M45647
Exclusive global launch! This item features Italian custom craftsmanship, dynamic chip re-coding, original factory fabrics, and original factory light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic items).
Please compare with the authentic Italian version!
We ensure 100% restoration of the authentic look! Exclusive original factory fabrics, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, official website's latest full gift box!
20 x 22.5 x 8 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Aged cowhide trim
Microfiber lining
Brushed metal hardware
Leather luggage tag
Side buckle
Zipper closure
Back external pocket
Back internal pocket, card slot
Strap: Non-removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 21.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 48.0 cm
Made in Italy
